§6Firebricks§f

§aCreate heat-resistant bricks essential for advanced furnaces.§f

§bFirebricks§f are made from §bFireclay§f (clay + aluminium or limestone + sand), which is then smelted. They are the foundational material for all high-temperature processing.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Bricked Furnace§f (100% speed boost for construction materials)
§b• Blast Furnace§f construction
§b• Crucible§f construction
§b• High-temperature machine casings

§eTip§f: Use a §bbricked furnace§f to smelt firebricks — it gets a 200% speed bonus for this!
